title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: NEIGHBORHOOD CENTER OF SOUTH MORROW COUNTY UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with past-due electric, water, and propane bills. 441 N Main Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Households at 300% or lower of the Federal Poverty Line (FPL) Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 676-5024 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 676-5024 Main phone Main phone (541) 676-5024 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Most recent utility bill and any shut-off notices AREA SERVED: South Morrow County (Cities of Hardman, Heppner, Ione, and Lexington) Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY AND EMERGENCY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEIGHBORHOOD CENTER OF SOUTH MORROW COUNTY
